rulings.Case Title: STAPLETON, DAVID P., THE COURT-APPOINTED RECEIVER VS. 3066 MARKET STREET, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2014. LINE 1. - PLAINTIFF DAVID P. STAPLETON MOTION For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Amended Complaint shall be filed forthwith. Prevailing party prepare order.= (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE WONG VS. DILLON WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2014. LINE 2 - DEFENDANT DILLON WONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is DENIED. Moving party failed to show how 20 of Complaint is irrelevant, false, improper or not drawn in conformity with the laws of this state in partition action. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: HARRY ZHAO VS. YANE GU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Proposed Response
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2014. LINE 3. -DEFENDANT YANE GU Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Proposed Response. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED, subject to Defendant both (1) posting $4,800 with the Court no later than March 11, 2013 by 4 p.m.; and (2) filing an answer no later that March 11, 2014 by 4 p.m. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: WEBCO GROUP, LLC VS. PAOLO SCARPE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMIOTED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, MARCH 10, 2014. LINE 4 -DEFENDANT'S PAUL IANTORNO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is overruled, 5 Days to answer. Whether letting "the premises be used as a location for filming of a commercially-produced pornographic movie" is a non-curable breach is an issue of fact. Notice provides for only one termination date pursuant to "3 Day Notice to Quit." The other date was based on termination of the lease on its own terms, not on the notice. = (501/LKS)
